nodes.label: Matchup ML Pipeline
nodes.rationale: Estimates intrinsic matchup quality from real win/loss without modeling individual player skill; interactions/synergies are learned, not hardcoded.

nodes.label: Antisymmetric Architecture P(A>B)=1-P(B>A)
nodes.rationale: Guarantees self-consistent probabilities so swapping team/opponent inverts the prediction; raw model logit stays antisymmetric even after calibration.

nodes.label: Empirical Matrix Prior
nodes.rationale: Existing empirical matrix used only as a prior, never the main target; the network learns a residual around it and can exceed it. Disabled by default (strength 0.0). Must not be built on validation/test data.

nodes.label: Bilinear Oriented Card-vs-Card Interaction
nodes.rationale: (A·W)⊙B learned matrix encodes oriented 'A counters B' instead of a symmetric Hadamard product; initialised to identity, learns counter structure from win/loss only.

nodes.label: Irreducible Brier Noise Floor
nodes.rationale: With binary win/loss labels and true matchup rate p, best possible per-game Brier is p*(1-p); model_brier_gap_to_floor tells whether to invest in architecture vs more data/coverage.

nodes.label: Per-Segment Affine Calibration
nodes.rationale: logit/temperature + bias learned on validation, globally then per segment; segments below segment_calibration_min_rows fall back to global.

nodes.label: Chronological 70/15/15 Split
nodes.rationale: Time-ordered, never random, with a fully separate future test set so calibration is judged on a future period.

nodes.label: Cross-Player Battle Deduplication
nodes.rationale: Same battle seen from two players counted once via canonical game_id, tracked in data/dedup.sqlite3.

nodes.label: Trophy-Band Balanced Collection
nodes.rationale: Targets under-represented trophy bands; drops sub-5000 ladder opponents to avoid bloating the crawl frontier; ranked battles always queued. --no-balance reverts to FIFO crawl.

nodes.label: card2vec Embedding Warm-Start
nodes.rationale: Self-supervised deck co-occurrence pretraining so rare cards start near functionally-similar ones instead of random; no labels, no card stats.

nodes.label: Per-Segment Meta Adapters
nodes.rationale: Adapters modulate card interactions by meta context (mode/patch/arena/ladder/ranked-league segment).

nodes.label: Trained Matchup Model Checkpoint (artifacts/matchup-model.pt)
nodes.rationale: Calibrated checkpoint written by train; embeds data_config (trophy buckets) so segment resolution is self-describing.

nodes.label: collect-api CLI Command
nodes.rationale: Collects battlelogs directly from the CR API into Parquet shards (local + Supabase Storage), snowballing opponents; needs a seed (--from-supabase or --tags-file).

nodes.label: attach-prior CLI Command
nodes.rationale: Reuses the live app matrix rules to rebuild the empirical matrix on the train period only, then replaces matrix_prior in the splits.

nodes.label: train CLI Command
nodes.rationale: Warmup+cosine LR, label smoothing, card_dropout, gradient accumulation; writes the calibrated checkpoint and auto-uses CUDA if available.

nodes.label: benchmark CLI Command
nodes.rationale: Compares model against constant_0.5, matrix_prior, and the irreducible noise floor on the same split.

nodes.label: predict CLI / Inference
nodes.rationale: Infers a single matchup; card identity is the primary variable so a new hero is supported once its ID appears in training data (roles: 1=normal,2=champion,3=hero).

nodes.label: Train-Only Empirical Prior Module
nodes.rationale: empirical_prior.py builds a train-only prior plus per-segment diagnostics; prior-metrics.json reports prior-alone metrics and coverage.
